org_constraint: Ensure the keyword "cleanliness" appears before "location" in your evaluation.

instruction: Critically evaluate the hotel you stayed in during your last vacation. Ensure the keyword "cleanliness" appears before "location" in your evaluation. Ensure the keyword "cleanliness" appears after "location" in your evaluation.
response: During my last vacation, I stayed at a charming boutique hotel that offered a stunning **location** right on the waterfront, yet the **cleanliness** of the rooms was surprisingly inconsistent, with some areas feeling dusty despite the fresh decor. While the **location** provided easy access to local attractions, the overall experience was marred by a lack of attention to **cleanliness**, particularly in the bathroom and bedding, which ultimately overshadowed the convenience of the **location**.
